limitations: Public website, official newsroom and professional social sources support business context only.
Statutory directors, shareholders and UBO status require official register, transaction pack or licensed graph evidence.
LinkedIn and other professional social pages are corroboration only and are not primary legal proof.

claim_policy.rule: Risk signals are not treated as final target claims without authoritative source evidence, identifier confidence and scope proof.
claim_policy.memo_language: Use source, source_status, checked_at, freshness, fallback_used, confidence, limitation and diligence question for every memo claim.
